changeSet.author: ahri-pathology
changeSet.comment: Backfill notebook_departments for pathology notebooks that still have no department link (e.g. top-level instances created without inheriting a parent template). Links them to the canonical "Pathology Laboratory" lab unit only, so notebook-scoped Storage and Inventory features resolve a department. Idempotent: skips notebooks that already have any link.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON lower(trim(ts.name)) = 'pathology laboratory' WHERE ( n.title LIKE 'Pathology Laboratory%' OR n.workflow_type IN ( 'pathology', 'histopathology_biopsy_tissue', 'peripheral_smear_bone_marrow_morphology', 'fnac', 'cytology_liquid_based_pap_smear' ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_departments existing WHERE existing.notebook_id = n.id );
